summary: 2 film announcements, 2 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: The Hunt for Gollum
film.announcement: Andy Serkis directs and appears in character for the Lord of the Rings spinoff, with set footage revealed.

film.title: Miss Marple (Audible Adaptation)
film.announcement: Toni Collette and Kit Harington lead the cast for an Audible adaptation of an Agatha Christie classic, with Collette playing Miss Marple.

tv.title: Plastic Beauty
tv.announcement: Netflix cosmetic surgery drama sets September premiere with Mayu Matsuoka and Riisa Naka, adding 23 cast members.

tv.title: Unleeshed
tv.announcement: Comedy Invasion alums Alisha Dhillon and Quentin Lee reunite for Vertical series Unleeshed.
